theme: Dark Mode Maximalism - Mystical Cosmic & Ancient Manuscript Fusion

headings.usage: Use for all primary headers, astrological chart titles, and ancient text citations. Gives an authoritative, sacred, and editorial feel.

body.usage: Use for the conversational UI, chat bubbles, and dashboard data points to maintain high legibility.

labels_overlines.usage: Use for metadata, planet names, Dashas, and transit labels.

colors.archetype: Luxury / Mystical (Deep Space with Gold Accents)

rules.background: Never use pure black. The background should be a deep cosmic indigo (#080B12).
rules.borders: Use subtle gold-tinted borders (e.g., border-[#D4AF37]/20) to separate sections, avoiding harsh white/gray lines.
rules.contrast: Ensure all text over dark backgrounds meets APCA standards. Use text-shadows for text layered over celestial image backgrounds.
rules.gradients: Avoid generic purple/blue AI gradients. If using gradients, use deep indigo fading into absolute darkness, or a very subtle metallic gold sheen.

layouts.strategy: The 'Bento' Grid Protocol mixed with Swiss Editorial
layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12). Create breathing room around sacred texts and charts.

dashboard_grid.items: Chart visualization gets col-span-full md:col-span-8. Transits and Dashas get col-span-4.

chat_interface.sidebar: w-72 border-r border-[#D4AF37]/20 bg-[#080B12]/80 backdrop-blur-xl (contains history and book library).
chat_interface.main_area: Flex-1, centered constraints for chat bubbles. Max-width 3xl for readability.

layouts.onboarding: Centered, distraction-free layout with celestial background. Use Shadcn Form components with transparent, border-bottom only inputs.

surfaces.glassmorphism: Use high-end glass (bg-[#080B12]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-[#D4AF37]/10) for sticky headers and chat floating elements.
surfaces.cards: Flat solid surfaces (#111827) with a delicate 1px gold-tinted border. Subtle hover lift (-translate-y-1) with soft ambient gold shadow.

visual_enhancers.textures: Incorporate subtle grain/noise overlays across the background to give a tactile, ancient manuscript or cosmic dust feel.
visual_enhancers.geometry: Incorporate subtle, low-opacity Yantra or Mandala geometric SVG patterns as absolute positioned watermarks inside dashboard cards.

specific_components.buttons: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (rounded-md) with 1px solid gold border and transparent background, turning solid gold with dark text on hover.
specific_components.chat_bubbles: User: minimal outline. AI Astrologer: Soft elevated surface (#1F2937) with a left-accent border of gold. Inline citations must be distinct, looking like small parchment tags.
specific_components.inputs: Shadcn Input, heavily customized. Background transparent, white text, bottom border only for a sleek, mystical input feel.
specific_components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select, and Calendar. Never use native inputs.
specific_components.toasts: Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., PDF uploaded successfully).

images.description: Celestial night sky with stars, to be used with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/70) behind the main application shell or onboarding screen.
Gold geometry mandala, use as a very low opacity (10%) background watermark behind the Kundali chart or inside the book library cards.
Ancient manuscript texture. Can be used as a subtle texture overlay for the specific UI elements that display direct quotes/citations from the Shastras.

media.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for general UI icons. For astrological symbols, use SVG assets or text-based unicode Graha symbols.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast ratio is met, particularly for gold text on dark indigo.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, form fields, chat inputs, book cards) MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="chat-submit-button"`).
accessibility.motion: Respect `prefers-reduced-motion` for any starry background animations or card hover effects.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build out the frontend using React (Vite/Next.js structure provided) + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn UI.
Install `lucide-react` for icons and `sonner` for toast notifications.
Implement a dark theme by default, enforcing the deep cosmic indigo (#080B12) background.
Structure the app into three main views: 1) Onboarding (birth details), 2) Dashboard (Kundali chart, transits), 3) Chat/Library Interface.
Do NOT use HTML-based date pickers for the birth date; you MUST use Shadcn Calendar/Datepicker.
For the Kundali Chart, render a visual geometry (pure HTML/SVG lines) rather than just a table.
Ensure the citations in the AI chat response are styled distinctively, perhaps with a subtle manuscript background or italicized serif typography.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Do not create a standard SaaS dashboard. The app must feel sacred and mystical.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glass-morphism effects (backdrop-blur-xl).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`). Add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the CSS file.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
NEVER use placeholder image URLs (like via.placeholder.com). Use the provided Unsplash URLs.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (like 🤖🧠🔮) for icons. Rely on clean Lucide icons or SVG geometry.
DO NOT use complete `transparent` background in headers, overlays, or dropdowns. Always use a solid dark color or blurred glassmorphism.
